description: validateSearch with Zod schema for typed search params per route
Link preload: intent (default), render (above-fold), false (rare links)
createServerValidate() from @tanstack/start for server-side form validation

trap: prefetchQuery without staleTime matching navigation time

trap: Suspense boundary at route level instead of pendingComponent

trap: Raw Response.json in a route loader instead of a server route handler
description: Server route via createFileRoute with server.handlers (GET/POST/...) returning Response/json -- not data in a loader
